turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: hey , what are you up to ?

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: hello , i am listening to lady gaga , do you like her ?

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: i prefer rock music , like led zeppelin .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: madonna is my first favorite . do you go to a lot of concerts ?

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: i would if i could , but i have a farm to maintain .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: i work at the mall , so i'm close to the venue .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: i prefer hiking outdoors and photography rather than crowded malls .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: pays well , lol . i make great money as the manager .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: work is tiring . i would love to travel the world instead .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: i would love to travel as well .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: staying here is fine too though . my two dogs keep me company .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: i love dogs ! what kind do you have ?

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: they're both greyhounds . their names are tom and jerry .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: that's cute ! how old are they ?

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: only two months ! i actually have to take them for a walk right now
